## Summary

- 

## Validation

- [ ] Local tests or targeted checks completed
- [ ] Documentation updated, if needed
- [ ] No generated data, caches, credentials, or local environment files included

## Release Checklist

For release PRs only:

- [ ] Version metadata is consistent
- [ ] Changelog/release notes are updated
- [ ] Release commit is identified
- [ ] Annotated tag will point to the release commit
- [ ] Release PR will be merged with a merge commit, not squash or rebase
- [ ] Tag commit will be reachable from `main` before publishing the GitHub Release
- [ ] Draft GitHub Release will be reviewed before publishing
